---
title: "Comparison"
subtitle: "Share shift, mix effects, and before/after reads"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: patterns-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, categories, description]
---

::: {.section-label}
Analysis Playbook · Comparison
:::

Comparing groups, periods, and segments without letting the comparison itself mislead —
mix effects, denominators that move, and the charts that make a fair comparison obvious.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**🚧 In progress** — entries coming soon.
:::

::: {#patterns-listing}
:::
